title: App Settings - General - Licenses no wifi  [New]
scenario: License Source links show "Something is wrong" error when WiFi is off in Poly Studio Mobile App Settings > General > Licenses
steps: 1. Turn off WiFi on the device.
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Licenses.
4. Tap on a license link (e.g., MIT, Apache 2.0, etc.).
5. Observe the license screen — it should display the headline, description, and a Cancel (X) button.
6. Tap the Source link within the license screen.
expected: The Source link loads the source content properly within the app.
